## BULLET chart, ABRID style

Render as SVG (or equivalent) on a 960x540 px canvas.
Every position, size, and color below is exact. No adjectives, no improvisation.

### AI metadata (for agent routing)
```json
{
  "code": "CH-MAG-04",
  "ovp_version": "1.0",
  "intent": [
    "magnitude",
    "variance",
    "progress"
  ],
  "form": "measure bar vs target tick over qualitative bands",
  "data_required": "KPIs with a value, a target, and up to 3 ascending qualitative bands",
  "family": "MAG",
  "alternatives": [
    "CH-DEV-01 (signed variance only)"
  ],
  "see_instead": [
    {
      "when": "no meaningful target exists",
      "use": "CH-RNK-01"
    }
  ]
}
```

Use when:
- KPI reporting: actual vs target vs poor/ok/good bands
- dashboard rows that must survive print (the honest gauge)

Do NOT use when:
- no target (plain bar)
- trend matters more than level (CH-TIM-06 when built)

### Input data shape
```json
{
  "title": "action title naming the worst KPI gap",
  "source": "bottom-left always",
  "unit": "on first value label",
  "categories": "array of {label, value, target, bands: [b1<b2<b3]}"
}
```

### Rules
- measure bar in ink, target as a negative-role tick, bands as computed shades
- band shades derive from background+ink mix, never extra palette entries
- unit once

### Never do this
- gauges (this IS the honest gauge)
- rainbow bands
- missing target

### QA before delivering
- [ ] every row has value, target, ascending bands
- [ ] unit once
- [ ] source present

### Colors (resolved, use these exact values)

| Element | Color |
|---|---|
| background | `#FFFFFF` |
| measure | `#0E3A2C` |
| target | `#9E2B25` |
| category_label | `#3E4C46` |
| value_label | `#0E3A2C` |
| title | `#0E3A2C` |
| source | `#3E4C46` |

### Fonts

- Title font: 'Segoe UI',Arial,sans-serif, weight 700
- All other text: 'Segoe UI',Arial,sans-serif, weight 400 (600 on highlighted items)

### Language chrome

No kicker, no eyebrow; title at the default y.
